use_cases: Displaying website or app screenshots in documentation and landing pages
Creating portfolio showcases for design work or case studies
Presenting product demos in a realistic browser frame context
Building marketing materials with device mockup imagery
Adding visual context to tutorial or demo content
ai_summary: A reusable browser window component that renders a Safari-like interface frame with macOS-style traffic light buttons, address bar, and a responsive image preview area. Supports dark mode theming and accepts custom styling via className props for flexible integration into documentation sites, landing pages, or portfolio showcases.
